The '''Verpine droid disintegrator''' was a powerful [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion weapon]] designed by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] for the destruction of [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. It was an improved version of the [[Verpine droid disruptor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
